'''fachate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rhotically|rhotically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-ch-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rhotically|rhotically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fachate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:fachate|fachate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fachatesher|fachatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fachatesherĂ«m|fachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fachatero|fachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fachateshĂ«|fachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fachateshĂ«m|fachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifachatero|gokifachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifachateshĂ«|gokifachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifachateshĂ«m|gokifachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofachankerom|gofachankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofachankeshĂ«|gofachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofachankeshĂ«m|gofachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofachankeya|gofachankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fachaterom|fachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fachatemu|fachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fachateya|fachateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifachaterom|gokifachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifachatemu|gokifachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifachateya|gokifachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:fachachate|fachachate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fachachatesher|fachachatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fachachatesherĂ«m|fachachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fachachatero|fachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fachachateshĂ«|fachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fachachateshĂ«m|fachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifachachatero|gokifachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifachachateshĂ«|gokifachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifachachateshĂ«m|gokifachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofachachankerom|gofachachankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofachachankeshĂ«|gofachachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofachachankeshĂ«m|gofachachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofachachankeya|gofachachankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fachachaterom|fachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fachachatemu|fachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fachachateya|fachachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifachachaterom|gokifachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifachachatemu|gokifachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifachachateya|gokifachachateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:fĂŠchĂŠte|fĂŠchĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fĂŠchĂŠtesher|fĂŠchĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m|fĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠchĂŠtero|fĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|fĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|fĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠchĂŠtero|gokifĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|gokifĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|gokifĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofĂŠchĂŠnkerom|gofĂŠchĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«|gofĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gofĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofĂŠchĂŠnkeya|gofĂŠchĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠchĂŠterom|fĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠchĂŠtemu|fĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fĂŠchĂŠteya|fĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠchĂŠterom|gokifĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠchĂŠtemu|gokifĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifĂŠchĂŠteya|gokifĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:fafchafte|fafchafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fafchaftesher|fafchaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafchaftesherĂ«m|fafchaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafchaftero|fafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fafchafteshĂ«|fafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafchafteshĂ«m|fafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafchaftero|gokifafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifafchafteshĂ«|gokifafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafchafteshĂ«m|gokifafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofafchafnkerom|gofafchafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofafchafnkeshĂ«|gofafchafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofafchafnkeshĂ«m|gofafchafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofafchafnkeya|gofafchafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafchafterom|fafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafchaftemu|fafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fafchafteya|fafchafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafchafterom|gokifafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafchaftemu|gokifafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifafchafteya|gokifafchafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
